subTaskTemplate.name: Order Title Ownership Report – Old Republic
subTaskTemplate.description: Order Title Ownership Report – Old Republic – Order Title Ownership Report with Old Republic through their web portal
subTaskTemplate.type: Order Title – Order Title Ownership Report – Old Republic

subTaskTemplate.name: Order Title Ownership Report – Equity Attorney (Trust)
subTaskTemplate.description: Order Title Ownership Report – Equity Attorney (Trust) – Order Title Ownership Report with designated equity product attorney; specify in order we are looking for a title rundown, trust review, and trustee cert preparation. No title insurance or closing services.
subTaskTemplate.type: Order Title – Order Title Ownership Report – Equity Attorney (Trust)

subTaskTemplate.name: Obtain Quote – New Deed Prep
subTaskTemplate.description: Obtain Quote – New Deed Prep – Obtain quote with selected bank attorney for new deed preparation
subTaskTemplate.type: Order Title – Obtain Quote – New Deed Prep

subTaskTemplate.name: Order Title – Bank Attorney
subTaskTemplate.description: Order Title – Bank Attorney – Order title with selected bank attorney
subTaskTemplate.type: Order Title – Order Title – Bank Attorney
